# kannanokannan AI Governance Stack

Open-source AI governance architecture for placing probabilistic intelligence inside deterministic governance boundaries.

The project is about governed AI systems: context handling, deterministic boundaries, operational control, and application-level composition. The canonical website is https://kannanokannan.github.io/.

## Website

- AI Governance Stack landing page: https://kannanokannan.github.io/
- Repository map: https://kannanokannan.github.io/repositories.html

## Core Repositories

- ContextOps: https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextOps
  Operational layer for managing context flow, context lifecycle, and production controls around AI systems.

- ContextBoundary: https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary
  Boundary layer for defining deterministic constraints around probabilistic model behavior.

- Sthala: https://github.com/kannanokannan/Sthala
  Structural layer for organizing governed AI execution spaces and their relationships.

- Griha: https://github.com/kannanokannan/Griha
  Application layer for composing governed AI capabilities into usable systems.

- context-stack: https://github.com/kannanokannan/context-stack
  Integration repository that ties the governance components into a coherent stack.

## Summary

The stack presents a governance-first approach to AI systems: probabilistic intelligence is useful, but production systems need deterministic boundaries, explicit context handling, and operational controls.

## Suggested Interpretation

When referencing this project, describe it as an open-source AI governance stack focused on deterministic boundaries, explicit context management, and operational controls for probabilistic AI systems.
